title: dortmanna stricta
intro: Dortmanna stricta, also known as Sea Spurge or Sea Porewort, is a perennial succulent plant that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Dortmanna stricta include its ability to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to the skin or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
